measurement_note: Size is w, the number of one-letter words; k equals the full sentence length, so every word interval is feasible. The reference maintains each interval length incrementally for O(w^2) work. A correct implementation that explicitly resums every candidate interval completes all tiers and fails by cubic scaling.
